---
title: "conform_mask"
generated: true
description: "Conform a mask or weight for elementwise applying to a tensor."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:conform_mask -->
```python
conform_mask(tensor: Shaped[Array, ...], mask: Bool[Array, ...], axis: Sequence[int]) -> Shaped[Array, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:conform_mask -->
Conform a mask or weight for elementwise applying to a tensor.

There is almost certainly a better way to do this.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:conform_mask -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensor` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `mask` | `Bool[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `axis` | `Sequence[int]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Shaped[Array, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:conform_mask -->
### See also

[`apply_mask`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops/apply_mask.qmd)
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
